title: antidesma neurocarpum
intro: Antidesma neurocarpum, also known as the Philippine staff tree, is a plant species native to the Philippines, characterized by its unique properties and medicinal uses. This plant is valued for its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The medicinal properties of Antidesma neurocarpum have been associated with health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and promoting wound healing. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are commonly used in traditional medicine in the Philippines.
